title: Ultimate Food
description:
This mod adds more food items to Minecraft.  Ultimate Mods Merch: https://ultimate-mods.printify.me/
Important: Ultimate Food Remastered is Coming sometime possibly far into the future!
body:
This mod adds more food items to Minecraft.  It also adds some achievements to the game.  I hope you enjoy the food mod. Reason for archiving this project was it broke and I didn't have a backup for it.

**_Important: Ultimate Food is going to be revived in Ultimate Materials_**

List Of Things it added

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Advancments, Hot Dogs, Burgers, Fake Strawberries, Cheese, Tomatos, Cheese Pizza, Cooked Cheese Pizza, Cereal, Cheese Burgers, Bacon, Cooked Bacon, Three Amazing Paintings, Real Strawberries.

</details>



To get the recipes for the food you need to craft a hot dog (six pieces of bread, three on the top left corner and three on the bottom right corner, one cooked porkchop on the two other corners and one cooked porkchop in the center.)

This mod was made by CarlGamer2024, the owner of Ultimate mods.


Ultimate Mods Website: [ultimatemods.kraczek.co](https://ultimatemods.kraczek.co/)


[Channel Link](https://www.youtube.com/@UltimateMods2024)


Ultimate Mods Merch: [Merch Link](https://ultimate-mods.printify.me/)
